reviews.review_msg: Kinda more into his own stuff than into teaching. Really likes Vancouver neighbourhoods.

Came into this class thinking I would be learning about research methods. Instead I feel like I took a class on Vancouver Neighborhoods as the main topic. I don't understand the central point of what he is trying to teach & he doesn't always reply back for emails. So confused. Feels like i need backgroud knowledge on Vancouver neighborhoods
The Best pro! Always well organized, and the lecture is interesting.

He is the most huggable person you will meet. I had to resist the temptation of standing up mid lectures and give him a hug multiple times and Im a straight dude. He uses alot of demos in his lectures and gets way too exited about them. Very challenging assignment but the tests are fair. Overall very fun course, wold strongly recommend
